case_title: KHOI THIEN NGUYEN VS. HERTZ CORPORATION et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF NGUYEN, KHOI THIEN AS TO DEFENDANT HERTZ CORPORATION DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUN-29-2012 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-24-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUN-14-2012
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT HERTZ CORPORATION ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 3.0 DAYS

LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT HERTZ CORPORATION'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS IS GRANTED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO DEFENDANT HERTZ ONLY. A CAR RENTAL COMPANY IS NOT VICARIOUSLY LIABLE FOR THE NEGLIGENCE OF THE LESSEE AND PLAINTIFF DOES NOT ALLEGE ANY FACTS SHOWING THAT DEFENDANT HERTZ WAS DIRECTLY NEGLIGENT OR ENGAGED IN CRIMINAL WRONGDOING. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT, NOT REPORTED. =302/HK

calendar.matters:
MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS
Off Calendar Oct-05-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. JIN YON OF THE MCDOWELL SHAW & COLMAN APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT HERTZ CORPORATION'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS is Granted without leave to amend as to defendant Hertz only. A car rental company is not vicariously liable for the negligence of the lessee and plaintiff does not allege any facts showing that defendant Hertz was directly negligent or engaged in criminal wrongdoing. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, Not reported. =302/HK
